task_completion.description: Create the 'ARCHITECTURE' layer and draw the stage floor line
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Layer List shows an 'ARCHITECTURE' layer. The drawing area contains a horizontal line starting at the origin (0,0) and extending to the right (representing 15000mm).

task_completion.description: Create the 'RIGGING' layer and draw the lighting pipe circle
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Layer List shows a 'RIGGING' layer. A small circle is drawn high above the floor line (at coordinates 2000, 5500).

task_completion.description: Create the 'BEAM' layer and draw the beam center line
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Layer List shows a 'BEAM' layer. A line originates from the center of the pipe circle and extends downwards and to the right at a 45-degree angle until it reaches the floor line.

task_completion.description: Draw the upper and lower beam edge lines on the 'BEAM' layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: Two additional lines originate from the pipe center, flanking the center line. They represent a 36-degree total spread (18 degrees on each side of the center line) and extend down to intersect the floor line.

task_completion.description: Create the 'DIMENSIONS' layer and dimension the light pool width
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Layer List shows a 'DIMENSIONS' layer. A horizontal dimension is placed between the two points where the beam edge lines hit the floor line. The dimension value should read approximately 7992.
The LibreCAD window title bar or a save dialog shows the filename 'beam_study.dxf'.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreCAD GUI to create the drawing
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the LibreCAD application open with drawing tools being used, rather than a terminal window writing a DXF file via a Python script.

integrity.description: The dimension is a genuine CAD dimension entity
integrity.visual_evidence: The dimension measuring the light pool width has standard CAD dimension formatting (extension lines, dimension line, arrows) rather than being a manually placed text block.
The application interface matches LibreCAD, not another CAD program or a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected light pool width dimension is approximately 7992 mm (acceptable range: 7942 to 8042 mm). The pipe is located at (2000, 5500). The beam center line is angled at 315 degrees (45 degrees down from horizontal). The upper and lower beam edges are at 333 degrees and 297 degrees respectively. The expected filename is 'beam_study.dxf'.
